zh.lifeSummary: 當Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney於1097年11月6日出生在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯時，她的父親Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson27歲，母親Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes17歲。她於1135年之前與King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red在曼島結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1152年在曼島享年55歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney于1097年11月6日出生在英国苏格兰奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯时，她的父亲Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson27岁，母亲Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes17岁。她于1135年之前与King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red在曼岛结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1152年在曼岛享年55岁，埋葬在苏格兰奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯。

nameMeanings.name: Ingeborg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from the name of the fertility god Ing + borg ‘fortification’.

en.lifeSummary: When Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney was born on 6 November 1097, in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson, was 27 and her mother, Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes, was 17. She married King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red before 1135, in Isle of Man. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1152, in Isle of Man, at the age of 55, and was buried in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney est née le 6 novembre 1097, à Orkney Islands, Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red avant 1135, à Île de Man. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1152, à Île de Man, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Orkney Islands, Orkney, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney am 6. November 1097 in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson 27 und ihre Mutter Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes 17. Sie hat vor 1135 in Isle of Man King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1152 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Isle of Man und wurde in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney è nata il il 6 novembre 1097 nel Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red prima del 1135, nel Isola di Man. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1152, nel Isola di Man, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkneyが1097年11月6日にイギリススコットランドオルクニーオルクニー イスランズで生まれた時，父Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalsonは27歳，母Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnesは17歳であった。1135年以前にマン島でKing Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Redと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1152年にマン島で55歳で死去し，スコットランドオルクニーオルクニー イスランズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney(이)가 1097년 11월 6일 영국 스코틀랜드 르니 르니 이슬랜드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1135년 이전 맨섬에서 King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1152년 맨섬에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 르니 르니 이슬랜드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney nasceu em 6 de novembro de 1097, em Orkney Islands, Orkney, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red antes 1135, em Ilha de Man. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1152, em Ilha de Man, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney родилась 6 ноября 1097 г. в местности орни исландс, орни, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red перед 1135 г. в местности Остров Мэн. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1152 г. в местности Остров Мэн в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности орни исландс, орни, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney nació el 6 de noviembre de 1097, en Orkney Islands, Orkney, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes, tenía 17 años. Se casó con King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red antes de 1135, en Isla de Man. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1152, en Isla de Man, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland.
